workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"call_eh0QXXMZS1eYKwvmSxRA2Qyy\\\\nfc_0b99ec397d88285e0169ae2027fa88819686b9e537487b5a80\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"call_eh0QXXMZS1eYKwvmSxRA2Qyy\\\\nfc_0b99ec397d88285e0169ae2027fa88819686b9e537487b5a80\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/architecture/system.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/architecture/system.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/architecture/system.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# GlossaDocs Backend System Architecture\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThis is the system-level architecture for the single backend that supports:\\\\\\\\n- Story 1: basic editor with durable document save\\\\\\\\n- Story 3: Russian on-screen keyboard with persisted user preference\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Design Goals\\\\\\\\n- One backend system, no story-specific backend silos.\\\\\\\\n- Standards-based authentication (OIDC/Keycloak), no custom password handling.\\\\\\\\n- Durable storage for all required features.\\\\\\\\n- Local-first development flow with minimal AWS architecture drift.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Unified System Description\\\\\\\\nGlossaDocs uses a modular monolith in Fastify. The API edge receives all web traffic, validates requests, authenticates via JWT, and routes to domain modules. Domain modules persist state in PostgreSQL and enforce authorization invariants (especially ownership for documents).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nNaming conventions:\\\\\\\\n- OIDC claim / external identity field: &#96;sub&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Internal runtime identity variable: &#96;actorSub&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Domain storage owner key: &#96;owner_id&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nKey architectural separations:\\\\\\\\n- **Identity and access**: token verification and principal extraction\\\\\\\\n- **Documents**: user-owned document CRUD\\\\\\\\n- **Input preferences**: user settings like &#96;keyboardVisible&#96; and &#96;lastUsedLocale&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **API edge/platform**: validation, rate limiting, error mapping, health\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Unified Mermaid Diagram\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart LR\\\\\\\\n  user[WriterBrowser] --&gt; fe[ReactFrontend]\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"OIDC Auth Code + PKCE\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| kc[KeycloakIdP]\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"HTTPS Bearer JWT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| api[FastifyApi]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  subgraph app [GlossaDocsBackend]\\\\\\\\n    edge[ApiEdgeModule]\\\\\\\\n    idm[IdentityAccessModule]\\\\\\\\n    docm[DocumentModule]\\\\\\\\n    setm[InputPreferencesModule]\\\\\\\\n    obs[OperationalStoreModule]\\\\\\\\n    edge --&gt; idm\\\\\\\\n    edge --&gt; docm\\\\\\\\n    edge --&gt; setm\\\\\\\\n    edge --&gt; obs\\\\\\\\n  end\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  idm --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"JWKS / OIDC metadata cache\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| kc\\\\\\\\n  docm --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CRUD + ownership checks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| pg[(PostgreSQL)]\\\\\\\\n  setm --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"User settings\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| pg\\\\\\\\n  obs --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Audit + optional idempotency\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| pg\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Design Justification (Senior Review)\\\\\\\\n- **Security boundary correctness**: credential verification remains in Keycloak; app verifies signed tokens only.\\\\\\\\n- **Operational pragmatism**: a modular monolith avoids early distributed-system complexity while preserving strong boundaries.\\\\\\\\n- **Extensibility**: Story 3 extends settings without changing document APIs or auth model.\\\\\\\\n- **Cloud portability**: unchanged boundaries across local Docker and AWS ECS/RDS.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Cross-Module REST API Surface\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /health&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /ready&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /me&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /documents&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /documents/:id&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;POST /documents&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;PUT /documents/:id&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;DELETE /documents/:id&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /settings&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;PUT /settings&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAll endpoints except &#96;/health&#96; and &#96;/ready&#96; require a valid Bearer JWT.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Security Baseline\\\\\\\\n- Strict JWT verification: signature, issuer, audience, expiry.\\\\\\\\n- Ownership checks in repository predicates (&#96;owner_id = actorSub&#96;).\\\\\\\\n- Input schema validation and payload limits.\\\\\\\\n- HTML sanitization on document write path.\\\\\\\\n- Audit logs for mutating operations.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Capacity Baseline\\\\\\\\n- 1 Fastify instance (0.5 vCPU, 1 GB RAM)\\\\\\\\n- 1 PostgreSQL instance with pooling\\\\\\\\n- Keycloak single node for low traffic\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThis comfortably supports 10 concurrent users for CRUD + settings operations.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Deployment Mapping\\\\\\\\n- **Local**: Docker Compose with API + PostgreSQL + Keycloak\\\\\\\\n- **AWS target**: API on ECS/EC2, PostgreSQL on RDS, Keycloak on ECS/EC2, CloudFront + ALB edge\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Runtime Configuration\\\\\\\\n- &#96;API_PORT&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;DATABASE_URL&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;OIDC_ISSUER_URL&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;OIDC_AUDIENCE&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;OIDC_JWKS_URL&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;NODE_ENV&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":102}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/architecture/system.md\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# GlossaDocs Backend System Architecture\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThis is the system-level architecture for the single backend that supports:\\\\\\\\n- Story 1: basic editor with durable document save\\\\\\\\n- Story 3: Russian on-screen keyboard with persisted user preference\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Design Goals\\\\\\\\n- One backend system, no story-specific backend silos.\\\\\\\\n- Standards-based authentication (OIDC/Keycloak), no custom password handling.\\\\\\\\n- Durable storage for all required features.\\\\\\\\n- Local-first development flow with minimal AWS architecture drift.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Unified System Description\\\\\\\\nGlossaDocs uses a modular monolith in Fastify. The API edge receives all web traffic, validates requests, authenticates via JWT, and routes to domain modules. Domain modules persist state in PostgreSQL and enforce authorization invariants (especially ownership for documents).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nNaming conventions:\\\\\\\\n- OIDC claim / external identity field: &#96;sub&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Internal runtime identity variable: &#96;actorSub&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Domain storage owner key: &#96;owner_id&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nKey architectural separations:\\\\\\\\n- **Identity and access**: token verification and principal extraction\\\\\\\\n- **Documents**: user-owned document CRUD\\\\\\\\n- **Input preferences**: user settings like &#96;keyboardVisible&#96; and &#96;lastUsedLocale&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **API edge/platform**: validation, rate limiting, error mapping, health\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Unified Mermaid Diagram\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart LR\\\\\\\\n  user[WriterBrowser] --&gt; fe[ReactFrontend]\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"OIDC Auth Code + PKCE\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| kc[KeycloakIdP]\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"HTTPS Bearer JWT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| api[FastifyApi]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  subgraph app [GlossaDocsBackend]\\\\\\\\n    edge[ApiEdgeModule]\\\\\\\\n    idm[IdentityAccessModule]\\\\\\\\n    docm[DocumentModule]\\\\\\\\n    setm[InputPreferencesModule]\\\\\\\\n    obs[OperationalStoreModule]\\\\\\\\n    edge --&gt; idm\\\\\\\\n    edge --&gt; docm\\\\\\\\n    edge --&gt; setm\\\\\\\\n    edge --&gt; obs\\\\\\\\n  end\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  idm --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"JWKS / OIDC metadata cache\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| kc\\\\\\\\n  docm --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CRUD + ownership checks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| pg[(PostgreSQL)]\\\\\\\\n  setm --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"User settings\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| pg\\\\\\\\n  obs --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Audit + optional idempotency\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| pg\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Design Justification (Senior Review)\\\\\\\\n- **Security boundary correctness**: credential verification remains in Keycloak; app verifies signed tokens only.\\\\\\\\n- **Operational pragmatism**: a modular monolith avoids early distributed-system complexity while preserving strong boundaries.\\\\\\\\n- **Extensibility**: Story 3 extends settings without changing document APIs or auth model.\\\\\\\\n- **Cloud portability**: unchanged boundaries across local Docker and AWS ECS/RDS.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Cross-Module REST API Surface\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /health&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /ready&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /me&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /documents&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /documents/:id&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;POST /documents&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;PUT /documents/:id&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;DELETE /documents/:id&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /settings&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;PUT /settings&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAll endpoints except &#96;/health&#96; and &#96;/ready&#96; require a valid Bearer JWT.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Security Baseline\\\\\\\\n- Strict JWT verification: signature, issuer, audience, expiry.\\\\\\\\n- Ownership checks in repository predicates (&#96;owner_id = actorSub&#96;).\\\\\\\\n- Input schema validation and payload limits.\\\\\\\\n- HTML sanitization on document write path.\\\\\\\\n- Audit logs for mutating operations.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Capacity Baseline\\\\\\\\n- 1 Fastify instance (0.5 vCPU, 1 GB RAM)\\\\\\\\n- 1 PostgreSQL instance with pooling\\\\\\\\n- Keycloak single node for low traffic\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThis comfortably supports 10 concurrent users for CRUD + settings operations.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Deployment Mapping\\\\\\\\n- **Local**: Docker Compose with API + PostgreSQL + Keycloak\\\\\\\\n- **AWS target**: API on ECS/EC2, PostgreSQL on RDS, Keycloak on ECS/EC2, CloudFront + ALB edge\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Runtime Configuration\\\\\\\\n- &#96;API_PORT&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;DATABASE_URL&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;OIDC_ISSUER_URL&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;OIDC_AUDIENCE&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;OIDC_JWKS_URL&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS&#96;\\\\\\\\n- API Edge Module\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n**Can do**\\\\\\\\n- Route registration and request lifecycle orchestration.\\\\\\\\n- Input validation, auth guard invocation, error translation.\\\\\\\\n- CORS, rate limiting, idempotency handling, request tracing.\\\\\\\\n- Health/readiness endpoint handling.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Does not do**\\\\\\\\n- Document/domain business logic.\\\\\\\\n- Ownership decisions or settings logic.\\\\\\\\n- Long-term data modeling for domain entities.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Internal Architecture\\\\\\\\nThe API edge is the composition root. It wires middleware, controllers, and domain service ports.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart TB\\\\\\\\n  req[HTTPRequest] --&gt; middleware[Validation + Auth + RateLimit]\\\\\\\\n  middleware --&gt; router[RouteHandler]\\\\\\\\n  router --&gt; service[DomainServicePort]\\\\\\\\n  service --&gt; router\\\\\\\\n  router --&gt; resp[HTTPResponse]\\\\\\\\n  middleware --&gt; err[ErrorMapper]\\\\\\\\n  err --&gt; resp\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Design Justification\\\\\\\\n- Keeps HTTP/framework concerns separate from domain logic.\\\\\\\\n- Enables domain testing without HTTP stack dependency.\\\\\\\\n- Supports incremental hardening (rate limits, idempotency) at a single edge point.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Abstractions\\\\\\\\n- &#96;RequestContext&#96;: &#96;requestId&#96;, &#96;actorSub&#96;, &#96;scopes&#96;, trace metadata\\\\\\\\n- &#96;ApiError&#96;: typed hierarchy mapped to deterministic HTTP responses\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Stable Storage Mechanism\\\\\\\\nPostgreSQL operational tables (phased):\\\\\\\\n- Required now: &#96;api_audit_events&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Optional later (endpoint-driven): &#96;api_idempotency_keys&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Rate limiting persistence is not required in V1; prefer edge controls (ALB/WAF) or in-process guard for low traffic.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Storage Schemas\\\\\\\\n- &#96;api_audit_events(id uuid pk, actor_sub text, route text, method text, status_code int, created_at timestamptz, payload_hash text)&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;api_idempotency_keys(key text pk, actor_sub text, route text, response_code int, response_body jsonb, expires_at timestamptz)&#96; (optional, when endpoint idempotency is required)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## External REST API\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /health&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /ready&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Classes, Methods, Fields\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;ApiServer&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public start(): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public stop(): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private app: FastifyInstance&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;RequestContextFactory&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public fromRequest(req): RequestContext&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private buildRequestId(): string&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;RateLimitGuard&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public check(ctx: RequestContext): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private repo: RateLimitRepository&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Private** &#96;ErrorMapper&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public toHttp(err: unknown): HttpErrorPayload&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Class Hierarchy Diagram\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nclassDiagram\\\\\\\\n  class ApiServer {\\\\\\\\n    +start() Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    +stop() Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    -app FastifyInstance\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class RequestContextFactory {\\\\\\\\n    +fromRequest(req) RequestContext\\\\\\\\n    -buildRequestId() string\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class RateLimitGuard {\\\\\\\\n    +check(ctx) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    -repo RateLimitRepository\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class ErrorMapper {\\\\\\\\n    +toHttp(err) HttpErrorPayload\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  ApiServer --&gt; RequestContextFactory\\\\\\\\n  ApiServer --&gt; RateLimitGuard\\\\\\\\n  ApiServer --&gt; ErrorMapper\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":90}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/architecture/modules/api-edge-module.md\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# API Edge Module\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n**Can do**\\\\\\\\n- Route registration and request lifecycle orchestration.\\\\\\\\n- Input validation, auth guard invocation, error translation.\\\\\\\\n- CORS, rate limiting, idempotency handling, request tracing.\\\\\\\\n- Health/readiness endpoint handling.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Does not do**\\\\\\\\n- Document/domain business logic.\\\\\\\\n- Ownership decisions or settings logic.\\\\\\\\n- Long-term data modeling for domain entities.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Internal Architecture\\\\\\\\nThe API edge is the composition root. It wires middleware, controllers, and domain service ports.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart TB\\\\\\\\n  req[HTTPRequest] --&gt; middleware[Validation + Auth + RateLimit]\\\\\\\\n  middleware --&gt; router[RouteHandler]\\\\\\\\n  router --&gt; service[DomainServicePort]\\\\\\\\n  service --&gt; router\\\\\\\\n  router --&gt; resp[HTTPResponse]\\\\\\\\n  middleware --&gt; err[ErrorMapper]\\\\\\\\n  err --&gt; resp\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Design Justification\\\\\\\\n- Keeps HTTP/framework concerns separate from domain logic.\\\\\\\\n- Enables domain testing without HTTP stack dependency.\\\\\\\\n- Supports incremental hardening (rate limits, idempotency) at a single edge point.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Abstractions\\\\\\\\n- &#96;RequestContext&#96;: &#96;requestId&#96;, &#96;actorSub&#96;, &#96;scopes&#96;, trace metadata\\\\\\\\n- &#96;ApiError&#96;: typed hierarchy mapped to deterministic HTTP responses\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Stable Storage Mechanism\\\\\\\\nPostgreSQL operational tables (phased):\\\\\\\\n- Required now: &#96;api_audit_events&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Optional later (endpoint-driven): &#96;api_idempotency_keys&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Rate limiting persistence is not required in V1; prefer edge controls (ALB/WAF) or in-process guard for low traffic.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Storage Schemas\\\\\\\\n- &#96;api_audit_events(id uuid pk, actor_sub text, route text, method text, status_code int, created_at timestamptz, payload_hash text)&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;api_idempotency_keys(key text pk, actor_sub text, route text, response_code int, response_body jsonb, expires_at timestamptz)&#96; (optional, when endpoint idempotency is required)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## External REST API\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /health&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /ready&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Classes, Methods, Fields\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;ApiServer&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public start(): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public stop(): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private app: FastifyInstance&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;RequestContextFactory&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public fromRequest(req): RequestContext&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private buildRequestId(): string&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;RateLimitGuard&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public check(ctx: RequestContext): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private repo: RateLimitRepository&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Private** &#96;ErrorMapper&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public toHttp(err: unknown): HttpErrorPayload&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Class Hierarchy Diagram\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nclassDiagram\\\\\\\\n  class ApiServer {\\\\\\\\n    +start() Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    +stop() Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    -app FastifyInstance\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class RequestContextFactory {\\\\\\\\n    +fromRequest(req) RequestContext\\\\\\\\n    -buildRequestId() string\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class RateLimitGuard {\\\\\\\\n    +check(ctx) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    -repo RateLimitRepository\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class ErrorMapper {\\\\\\\\n    +toHttp(err) HttpErrorPayload\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  ApiServer --&gt; RequestContextFactory\\\\\\\\n  ApiServer --&gt; RateLimitGuard\\\\\\\\n  ApiServer --&gt; ErrorMapper\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":90,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":2938,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Users\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\tommy\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\CS485\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\GlossaDocs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\architecture\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\modules\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\api-edge-module.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":90}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"63189721-7234-4a9d-bbea-ea16ad25c53c\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"3c4653ee-8016-4083-9c62-0b1fc3049336\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-09T01:56:49.567Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"call_rkqdtsIV4tnC1yjIolmqDXBD\\\\nfc_0b99ec397d88285e0169ae2027fac48196b2a5e177ebc12930\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"call_rkqdtsIV4tnC1yjIolmqDXBD\\\\nfc_0b99ec397d88285e0169ae2027fac48196b2a5e177ebc12930\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/architecture/modules/identity-access-module.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/architecture/modules/identity-access-module.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/architecture/modules/identity-access-module.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# Identity and Access Module\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n**Can do**\\\\\\\\n- Validate JWT signature, issuer, audience, and expiry.\\\\\\\\n- Build authenticated principal (&#96;actorSub&#96;, username, scopes).\\\\\\\\n- Expose frontend bootstrap endpoint (&#96;/me&#96;).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Does not do**\\\\\\\\n- Password storage or verification logic.\\\\\\\\n- Custom login or password reset flows.\\\\\\\\n- Document mutation logic.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Internal Architecture\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart TB\\\\\\\\n  token[BearerJWT] --&gt; verifier[JwtVerifier]\\\\\\\\n  verifier --&gt; jwks[JwksCache]\\\\\\\\n  jwks --&gt; keycloak[KeycloakJWKS]\\\\\\\\n  verifier --&gt; claims[ClaimPolicy]\\\\\\\\n  claims --&gt; principal[AuthenticatedPrincipal]\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Design Justification\\\\\\\\n- Delegates credential risk to OIDC IdP (Keycloak), reducing app attack surface.\\\\\\\\n- JWKS caching improves availability and latency.\\\\\\\\n- Explicit claim policy avoids accidental permissive auth.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Abstractions\\\\\\\\n- &#96;AuthenticatedPrincipal { actorSub, username, email?, scopes[] }&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;TokenValidationResult { principal, issuedAt, expiresAt }&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Stable Storage Mechanism\\\\\\\\n- Keycloak realm DB (persistent) for identities and credentials.\\\\\\\\n- Optional app-side projection:\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;user_profiles&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Storage Schemas\\\\\\\\n- &#96;user_profiles(sub text pk, username text, email text, created_at timestamptz, updated_at timestamptz)&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## External REST API\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /me&#96; -&gt; &#96;{ sub, username, email, scopes }&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;/me.sub&#96; is the external OIDC-standard field name. Internally this module maps &#96;sub&#96; to &#96;AuthenticatedPrincipal.actorSub&#96;.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Classes, Methods, Fields\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;AuthMiddleware&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public authenticate(req): Promise&lt;AuthenticatedPrincipal&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private verifier: JwtVerifier&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;JwtVerifier&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public verify(token: string): Promise&lt;TokenValidationResult&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private jwksCache: JwksCache&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private expectedIssuer: string&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private expectedAudience: string&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;MeController&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public getMe(req, reply): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Private** &#96;ClaimPolicy&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public assertAllowedClaims(claims): void&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Class Hierarchy Diagram\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nclassDiagram\\\\\\\\n  class AuthMiddleware {\\\\\\\\n    +authenticate(req) Promise~AuthenticatedPrincipal~\\\\\\\\n    -verifier JwtVerifier\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class JwtVerifier {\\\\\\\\n    +verify(token) Promise~TokenValidationResult~\\\\\\\\n    -jwksCache JwksCache\\\\\\\\n    -expectedIssuer string\\\\\\\\n    -expectedAudience string\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class ClaimPolicy {\\\\\\\\n    +assertAllowedClaims(claims) void\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class MeController {\\\\\\\\n    +getMe(req, reply) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  AuthMiddleware --&gt; JwtVerifier\\\\\\\\n  JwtVerifier --&gt; ClaimPolicy\\\\\\\\n  MeController --&gt; AuthMiddleware\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":85}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/architecture/modules/identity-access-module.md\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# Identity and Access Module\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n**Can do**\\\\\\\\n- Validate JWT signature, issuer, audience, and expiry.\\\\\\\\n- Build authenticated principal (&#96;actorSub&#96;, username, scopes).\\\\\\\\n- Expose frontend bootstrap endpoint (&#96;/me&#96;).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Does not do**\\\\\\\\n- Password storage or verification logic.\\\\\\\\n- Custom login or password reset flows.\\\\\\\\n- Document mutation logic.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Internal Architecture\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart TB\\\\\\\\n  token[BearerJWT] --&gt; verifier[JwtVerifier]\\\\\\\\n  verifier --&gt; jwks[JwksCache]\\\\\\\\n  jwks --&gt; keycloak[KeycloakJWKS]\\\\\\\\n  verifier --&gt; claims[ClaimPolicy]\\\\\\\\n  claims --&gt; principal[AuthenticatedPrincipal]\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Design Justification\\\\\\\\n- Delegates credential risk to OIDC IdP (Keycloak), reducing app attack surface.\\\\\\\\n- JWKS caching improves availability and latency.\\\\\\\\n- Explicit claim policy avoids accidental permissive auth.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Abstractions\\\\\\\\n- &#96;AuthenticatedPrincipal { actorSub, username, email?, scopes[] }&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;TokenValidationResult { principal, issuedAt, expiresAt }&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Stable Storage Mechanism\\\\\\\\n- Keycloak realm DB (persistent) for identities and credentials.\\\\\\\\n- Optional app-side projection:\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;user_profiles&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Storage Schemas\\\\\\\\n- &#96;user_profiles(sub text pk, username text, email text, created_at timestamptz, updated_at timestamptz)&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## External REST API\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /me&#96; -&gt; &#96;{ sub, username, email, scopes }&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;/me.sub&#96; is the external OIDC-standard field name. Internally this module maps &#96;sub&#96; to &#96;AuthenticatedPrincipal.actorSub&#96;.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Classes, Methods, Fields\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;AuthMiddleware&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public authenticate(req): Promise&lt;AuthenticatedPrincipal&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private verifier: JwtVerifier&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;JwtVerifier&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public verify(token: string): Promise&lt;TokenValidationResult&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private jwksCache: JwksCache&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private expectedIssuer: string&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private expectedAudience: string&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;MeController&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public getMe(req, reply): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Private** &#96;ClaimPolicy&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public assertAllowedClaims(claims): void&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Class Hierarchy Diagram\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nclassDiagram\\\\\\\\n  class AuthMiddleware {\\\\\\\\n    +authenticate(req) Promise~AuthenticatedPrincipal~\\\\\\\\n    -verifier JwtVerifier\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class JwtVerifier {\\\\\\\\n    +verify(token) Promise~TokenValidationResult~\\\\\\\\n    -jwksCache JwksCache\\\\\\\\n    -expectedIssuer string\\\\\\\\n    -expectedAudience string\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class ClaimPolicy {\\\\\\\\n    +assertAllowedClaims(claims) void\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class MeController {\\\\\\\\n    +getMe(req, reply) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  AuthMiddleware --&gt; JwtVerifier\\\\\\\\n  JwtVerifier --&gt; ClaimPolicy\\\\\\\\n  MeController --&gt; AuthMiddleware\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":85,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":2574,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Users\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\tommy\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\CS485\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\GlossaDocs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\architecture\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\modules\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\identity-access-module.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":85}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"4b8fe8d8-c6c8-4c7e-b707-cd2a2818db96\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"617afd34-8b3e-4152-8dc5-78d143ac6ab6\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens Document Module\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n**Can do**\\\\\\\\n- Create/list/read/update/delete documents for authenticated users.\\\\\\\\n- Enforce strict ownership for all reads/writes.\\\\\\\\n- Persist title/content/language with creation and update timestamps.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Does not do**\\\\\\\\n- Realtime collaboration.\\\\\\\\n- Operational transform / CRDT merge logic.\\\\\\\\n- Full-text indexing/search in V1.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Internal Architecture\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart TB\\\\\\\\n  ctrl[DocumentsController] --&gt; svc[DocumentService]\\\\\\\\n  svc --&gt; repo[DocumentRepository]\\\\\\\\n  repo --&gt; db[(PostgreSQL documents)]\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Design Justification\\\\\\\\n- Service layer centralizes invariants (ownership, timestamp policy).\\\\\\\\n- Repository isolates SQL and supports deterministic tests.\\\\\\\\n- Controller remains thin and transport-focused.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Abstractions\\\\\\\\n- &#96;DocumentAggregate&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;id&#96;, &#96;ownerId&#96;, &#96;title&#96;, &#96;contentHtml&#96;, &#96;language&#96;, &#96;createdAt&#96;, &#96;updatedAt&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;DocumentPatch&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - partial update DTO (&#96;title&#96;, &#96;content&#96;, &#96;language&#96;)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Stable Storage Mechanism\\\\\\\\n- PostgreSQL &#96;documents&#96; table.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Storage Schemas\\\\\\\\n- &#96;documents(id uuid pk, owner_id text not null, title text not null, content text not null, language text not null, created_at timestamptz not null, updated_at timestamptz not null)&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Indexes:\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;idx_documents_owner_updated(owner_id, updated_at desc)&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;idx_documents_id_owner(id, owner_id)&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## External REST API\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /documents&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /documents/:id&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;POST /documents&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;PUT /documents/:id&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;DELETE /documents/:id&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Classes, Methods, Fields\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;DocumentsController&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public list(req, reply): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public get(req, reply): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public create(req, reply): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public update(req, reply): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public remove(req, reply): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;DocumentService&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public listByOwner(actorSub: string): Promise&lt;DocumentAggregate[]&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public getOwned(actorSub: string, id: string): Promise&lt;DocumentAggregate | null&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public createOwned(actorSub: string, payload: CreateDocumentDto): Promise&lt;DocumentAggregate&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public updateOwned(actorSub: string, id: string, patch: UpdateDocumentDto): Promise&lt;DocumentAggregate | null&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public deleteOwned(actorSub: string, id: string): Promise&lt;boolean&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private now(): Date&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;DocumentRepository&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public findByOwner(actorSub: string): Promise&lt;DocumentRow[]&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public findOwnedById(actorSub: string, id: string): Promise&lt;DocumentRow | null&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public insert(row: NewDocumentRow): Promise&lt;DocumentRow&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public updateOwned(actorSub: string, id: string, patch: PartialDocumentRow): Promise&lt;DocumentRow | null&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public deleteOwned(actorSub: string, id: string): Promise&lt;boolean&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;actorSub&#96; is mapped to &#96;owner_id&#96; in SQL predicates.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Class Hierarchy Diagram\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nclassDiagram\\\\\\\\n  class NullableDocumentAggregate\\\\\\\\n  class NullableDocumentRow\\\\\\\\n  class DocumentsController {\\\\\\\\n    +list(req, reply) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    +get(req, reply) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    +create(req, reply) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    +update(req, reply) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    +remove(req, reply) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class DocumentService {\\\\\\\\n    +listByOwner(actorSub) Promise~DocumentAggregate[]~\\\\\\\\n    +getOwned(actorSub, id) Promise~NullableDocumentAggregate~\\\\\\\\n    +createOwned(actorSub, payload) Promise~DocumentAggregate~\\\\\\\\n    +updateOwned(actorSub, id, patch) Promise~NullableDocumentAggregate~\\\\\\\\n    +deleteOwned(actorSub, id) Promise~boolean~\\\\\\\\n    -now() Date\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class DocumentRepository {\\\\\\\\n    +findByOwner(actorSub) Promise~DocumentRow[]~\\\\\\\\n Input Preferences Module\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n**Can do**\\\\\\\\n- Store and fetch per-user settings required by Story 3 and cross-story UX:\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;keyboardVisible&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;lastUsedLocale&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Expose typed settings read/update API.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Does not do**\\\\\\\\n- Keyboard layout generation.\\\\\\\\n- Character insertion behavior in editor.\\\\\\\\n- Locale-to-layout algorithm decisions beyond persisted preference values.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Internal Architecture\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart TB\\\\\\\\n  setCtrl[SettingsController] --&gt; setSvc[SettingsService]\\\\\\\\n  setSvc --&gt; setRepo[SettingsRepository]\\\\\\\\n  setRepo --&gt; db[(PostgreSQL user_settings)]\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Design Justification\\\\\\\\n- User settings are durable and cross-device when backend-backed.\\\\\\\\n- Strong typing on settings prevents key/value sprawl and migration drift.\\\\\\\\n- Small dedicated module avoids overloading document domain with preference concerns.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Abstractions\\\\\\\\n- &#96;UserSettings&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;lastUsedLocale: string&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;keyboardVisible: boolean&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Stable Storage Mechanism\\\\\\\\n- PostgreSQL &#96;user_settings&#96; table.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Storage Schemas\\\\\\\\n- &#96;user_settings(owner_id text pk, last_used_locale text not null default 'en-US', keyboard_visible boolean not null default true, updated_at timestamptz not null)&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## External REST API\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /settings&#96; -&gt; current user settings\\\\\\\\n- &#96;PUT /settings&#96; -&gt; partial update (&#96;lastUsedLocale&#96;, &#96;keyboardVisible&#96;)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Classes, Methods, Fields\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;SettingsController&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public get(req, reply): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public update(req, reply): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;SettingsService&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public getByOwner(actorSub: string): Promise&lt;UserSettings&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public updateByOwner(actorSub: string, patch: UpdateSettingsDto): Promise&lt;UserSettings&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private applyDefaults(row: SettingsRow | null): UserSettings&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;SettingsRepository&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public findByOwner(actorSub: string): Promise&lt;SettingsRow | null&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public upsert(actorSub: string, patch: Partial&lt;SettingsRow&gt;): Promise&lt;SettingsRow&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;actorSub&#96; is mapped to &#96;owner_id&#96; in SQL predicates.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Class Hierarchy Diagram\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nclassDiagram\\\\\\\\n  class SettingsController {\\\\\\\\n    +get(req, reply) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    +update(req, reply) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class SettingsService {\\\\\\\\n    +getByOwner(actorSub) Promise~UserSettings~\\\\\\\\n    +updateByOwner(actorSub, patch) Promise~UserSettings~\\\\\\\\n    -applyDefaults(row) UserSettings\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class SettingsRepository {\\\\\\\\n    +findByOwner(actorSub) Promise~SettingsRow~\\\\\\\\n    +upsert(actorSub, patch) Promise~SettingsRow~\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n Input Preferences Module\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n**Can do**\\\\\\\\n- Store and fetch per-user settings required by Story 3 and cross-story UX:\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;keyboardVisible&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;lastUsedLocale&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Expose typed settings read/update API.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Does not do**\\\\\\\\n- Keyboard layout generation.\\\\\\\\n- Character insertion behavior in editor.\\\\\\\\n- Locale-to-layout algorithm decisions beyond persisted preference values.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Internal Architecture\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart TB\\\\\\\\n  setCtrl[SettingsController] --&gt; setSvc[SettingsService]\\\\\\\\n  setSvc --&gt; cross-device when backend-backed.\\\\\\\\n- Strong typing on settings prevents key/value sprawl and migration drift.\\\\\\\\n- Small dedicated module avoids overloading document domain with preference concerns.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Abstractions\\\\\\\\n- &#96;UserSettings&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;lastUsedLocale: string&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;keyboardVisible: boolean&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Stable keyboard_visible boolean not null default true, updated_at timestamptz not null)&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## External REST API\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /settings&#96; -&gt; current user settings\\\\\\\\n- Operational Store Module\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n**Can do**\\\\\\\\n- Persist immutable audit events for mutating API requests.\\\\\\\\n- Provide a durable trail for debugging and incident analysis.\\\\\\\\n- Support optional idempotency storage when specific endpoints require replay protection.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Does not do**\\\\\\\\n- Domain business logic (documents/settings).\\\\\\\\n- Authentication or authorization decisions.\\\\\\\\n- Primary rate limiting decisions (prefer edge/gateway controls).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Internal Architecture\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart TB\\\\\\\\n  hook[RequestLifecycleHook] --&gt; writer[OperationalEventWriter]\\\\\\\\n  writer --&gt; repo[OperationalStoreRepository]\\\\\\\\n  repo --&gt; db[(PostgreSQL operational tables)]\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Design Justification\\\\\\\\n- Keeps operational concerns separate from product domain modules.\\\\\\\\n- Durable audit logging improves post-incident forensics.\\\\\\\\n- Idempotency remains optional and endpoint-driven to avoid over-engineering.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Abstractions\\\\\\\\n- &#96;AuditEvent&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;id&#96;, &#96;requestId&#96;, &#96;actorSub&#96;, &#96;route&#96;, &#96;method&#96;, &#96;statusCode&#96;, &#96;payloadHash&#96;, &#96;createdAt&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;IdempotencyRecord&#96; (optional)\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;key&#96;, &#96;actorSub&#96;, &#96;route&#96;, &#96;responseCode&#96;, &#96;responseBody&#96;, &#96;expiresAt&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Stable Storage Mechanism\\\\\\\\n- PostgreSQL operational tables.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Storage Schemas\\\\\\\\n- Required:\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;api_audit_events(id uuid pk, request_id text, actor_sub text, route text, method text, status_code int, created_at timestamptz, payload_hash text)&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Optional (only when idempotent endpoints are introduced):\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;api_idempotency_keys(key text pk, actor_sub text, route text, response_code int, response_body jsonb, expires_at timestamptz)&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## External REST API\\\\\\\\n- None. This module is internal-only.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Classes, Methods, Fields\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;OperationalEventWriter&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public writeAudit(event: AuditEvent): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public writeIdempotency(record: IdempotencyRecord): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private repo: OperationalStoreRepository&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;OperationalStoreRepository&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public insertAudit(event: AuditEvent): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public upsertIdempotency(record: IdempotencyRecord): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Private** &#96;OperationalHook&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public onResponse(ctx: RequestContext): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Class Hierarchy Diagram\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nclassDiagram\\\\\\\\n  class OperationalEventWriter {\\\\\\\\n    +writeAudit(event) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    +writeIdempotency(record) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    -repo OperationalStoreRepository\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class OperationalStoreRepository {\\\\\\\\n    +insertAudit(event) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    +upsertIdempotency(record) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class OperationalHook {\\\\\\\\n    +onResponse(ctx) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  OperationalHook --&gt; OperationalEventWriter\\\\\\\\n  OperationalEventWriter --&gt; OperationalStoreRepository\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":76}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/architecture/modules/operational-store-module.md\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# Operational Store Module\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n**Can do**\\\\\\\\n- Persist immutable audit events for mutating API requests.\\\\\\\\n- Provide a durable trail for debugging and incident analysis.\\\\\\\\n- Support optional idempotency storage when specific endpoints require replay protection.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Does not do**\\\\\\\\n- Domain business logic (documents/settings).\\\\\\\\n- Authentication or authorization decisions.\\\\\\\\n- Primary rate limiting decisions (prefer edge/gateway controls).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Internal Architecture\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart TB\\\\\\\\n  hook[RequestLifecycleHook] --&gt; writer[OperationalEventWriter]\\\\\\\\n  writer --&gt; repo[OperationalStoreRepository]\\\\\\\\n  repo --&gt; db[(PostgreSQL operational tables)]\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Design Justification\\\\\\\\n- Keeps operational concerns separate from product domain modules.\\\\\\\\n- Durable audit logging improves post-incident forensics.\\\\\\\\n- Idempotency remains optional and endpoint-driven to avoid over-engineering.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Abstractions\\\\\\\\n- &#96;AuditEvent&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;id&#96;, &#96;requestId&#96;, &#96;actorSub&#96;, &#96;route&#96;, &#96;method&#96;, &#96;statusCode&#96;, &#96;payloadHash&#96;, &#96;createdAt&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;IdempotencyRecord&#96; (optional)\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;key&#96;, &#96;actorSub&#96;, &#96;route&#96;, &#96;responseCode&#96;, &#96;responseBody&#96;, &#96;expiresAt&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Stable Storage Mechanism\\\\\\\\n- PostgreSQL operational tables.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Storage Schemas\\\\\\\\n- Required:\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;api_audit_events(id uuid pk, request_id text, actor_sub text, route text, method text, status_code int, created_at timestamptz, payload_hash text)&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Optional (only when idempotent endpoints are introduced):\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;api_idempotency_keys(key text pk, actor_sub text, route text, response_code int, response_body jsonb, expires_at timestamptz)&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## External REST API\\\\\\\\n- None. This module is internal-only.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Classes, Methods, Fields\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;OperationalEventWriter&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public writeAudit(event: AuditEvent): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public writeIdempotency(record: IdempotencyRecord): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;private repo: OperationalStoreRepository&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Public** &#96;OperationalStoreRepository&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public insertAudit(event: AuditEvent): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public upsertIdempotency(record: IdempotencyRecord): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Private** &#96;OperationalHook&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;public onResponse(ctx: RequestContext): Promise&lt;void&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Class Hierarchy Diagram\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nclassDiagram\\\\\\\\n  class OperationalEventWriter {\\\\\\\\n    +writeAudit(event) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    +writeIdempotency(record) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    -repo OperationalStoreRepository\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class OperationalStoreRepository {\\\\\\\\n    +insertAudit(event) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n    +upsertIdempotency(record) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  class OperationalHook {\\\\\\\\n    +onResponse(ctx) Promise~void~\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  OperationalHook --&gt; OperationalEventWriter\\\\\\\\n  OperationalEventWriter --&gt; deferred.\\\"}\",\"b9a17470-3908-490b-a195-635263678a1a\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"65b87d27-8d4b-425d-8a1d-8c25292d0b8a\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-09T01:56:49.568Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"call_GOmR176M7DYOUUwK2sAfEepr\\\\nfc_0b99ec397d88285e0169ae202b3cc081968a739ede6dfb12fb\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"call_GOmR176M7DYOUUwK2sAfEepr\\\\nfc_0b99ec397d88285e0169ae202b3cc081968a739ede6dfb12fb\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/specs/user-story-1-basic-editor-spec.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/specs/user-story-1-basic-editor-spec.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/specs/user-story-1-basic-editor-spec.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# User Story 1 Spec: Basic Editor with Persistent Save\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Header\\\\\\\\n- **Story**: As a writer, I want a basic document editor where I can create, edit, and save a text document so that I can actually write and return to my work.\\\\\\\\n- **Status**: Draft for implementation\\\\\\\\n- **Depends on**: &#96;docs/backend-architecture.md&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Single-backend assumption**: This story uses the same Fastify + Keycloak + PostgreSQL backend used by all stories.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Goal\\\\\\\\nReplace browser-only IndexedDB persistence with backend-backed CRUD while keeping the current editor UX (manual save + autosave, document list, open/delete, formatting).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Current Code Baseline\\\\\\\\n- Local document persistence is currently in &#96;src/app/utils/db.ts&#96;.\\\\\\\\n- Editor load/save and dirty state are in &#96;src/app/components/Editor.tsx&#96;.\\\\\\\\n- Document list/open/delete is in &#96;src/app/components/DocumentList.tsx&#96;.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Architecture (Story 1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart LR\\\\\\\\n  user[Writer] --&gt; fe[ReactFrontend]\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"OIDC login + JWT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| auth[Keycloak]\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Documents API\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| api[FastifyAPI]\\\\\\\\n  api --&gt; docSvc[DocumentService]\\\\\\\\n  docSvc --&gt; pg[(PostgreSQL)]\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Information Flow\\\\\\\\n1. User logs in through OIDC.\\\\\\\\n2. Frontend sends JWT with all document requests.\\\\\\\\n3. API authorizes by token subject and performs document CRUD.\\\\\\\\n4. Frontend replaces IndexedDB calls with API calls.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Functional Requirements\\\\\\\\n- User can create new document with default title.\\\\\\\\n- User can edit title/content and save manually.\\\\\\\\n- Autosave runs only when document is dirty.\\\\\\\\n- User can reopen prior documents from list.\\\\\\\\n- User can delete own documents.\\\\\\\\n- Save behavior must preserve latest title/content together.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Backend API Contract\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /documents&#96; -&gt; list current user's docs by &#96;updated_at desc&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /documents/:id&#96; -&gt; get one owned doc\\\\\\\\n- &#96;POST /documents&#96; -&gt; create owned doc\\\\\\\\n- &#96;PUT /documents/:id&#96; -&gt; update title/content/language\\\\\\\\n- &#96;DELETE /documents/:id&#96; -&gt; delete owned doc\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /me&#96; -&gt; token sanity/profile bootstrap for frontend\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Schema (Backend)\\\\\\\\nTable &#96;documents&#96;:\\\\\\\\n- &#96;id&#96; uuid pk\\\\\\\\n- &#96;owner_id&#96; text not null (OIDC &#96;sub&#96;)\\\\\\\\n- &#96;title&#96; text not null\\\\\\\\n- &#96;content&#96; text not null\\\\\\\\n- &#96;language&#96; text not null check in (&#96;en&#96;,&#96;de&#96;,&#96;ru&#96;)\\\\\\\\n- &#96;created_at&#96; timestamptz not null\\\\\\\\n- &#96;updated_at&#96; timestamptz not null\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nIndexes:\\\\\\\\n- &#96;(owner_id, updated_at desc)&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;(id, owner_id)&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Frontend Integration Plan\\\\\\\\n- Replace &#96;src/app/utils/db.ts&#96; storage methods with API client wrappers (same function surface preferred to reduce churn).\\\\\\\\n- Update &#96;Editor.tsx&#96; load/save lifecycle to call API wrappers.\\\\\\\\n- Update &#96;DocumentList.tsx&#96; list/delete/import-save to call API wrappers.\\\\\\\\n- Keep existing UI behaviors (&#96;hasUnsavedChanges&#96;, save status, toasts).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Non-Goals (Story 1)\\\\\\\\n- Collaboration/realtime editing\\\\\\\\n- Version history\\\\\\\\n- Offline sync conflict resolution\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Acceptance Criteria\\\\\\\\n- Logged-in user can create/edit/save/reopen/delete documents across browser refresh.\\\\\\\\n- Data is no longer required from IndexedDB for normal operation.\\\\\\\\n- User cannot access another user's document IDs.\\\\\\\\n- Autosave does not trigger when there are no unsaved changes.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Risks and Mitigations\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: Save race between autosave and manual save.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: Client-side in-flight guard and last-write-wins by &#96;updated_at&#96;.\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: HTML content from &#96;contentEditable&#96; can include unsafe markup.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: sanitize/allowlist on API write path.\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: Migration from local data to backend loses drafts.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: optional one-time import flow from local IndexedDB.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Test Plan\\\\\\\\n- API integration tests: CRUD with ownership enforcement.\\\\\\\\n- Frontend smoke flow: create -&gt; type -&gt; autosave -&gt; refresh -&gt; reopen.\\\\\\\\n- Negative tests: forbidden access to another user's doc.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":94}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/specs/user-story-1-basic-editor-spec.md\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# User Story 1 Spec: Basic Editor with Persistent Save\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Header\\\\\\\\n- **Story**: As a writer, I want a basic document editor where I can create, edit, and save a text document so that I can actually write and return to my work.\\\\\\\\n- **Status**: Draft for implementation\\\\\\\\n- **Depends on**: &#96;docs/backend-architecture.md&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Single-backend assumption**: This story uses the same Fastify + Keycloak + PostgreSQL backend used by all stories.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Goal\\\\\\\\nReplace browser-only IndexedDB persistence with backend-backed CRUD while keeping the current editor UX (manual save + autosave, document list, open/delete, formatting).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Current Code Baseline\\\\\\\\n- Local document persistence is currently in &#96;src/app/utils/db.ts&#96;.\\\\\\\\n- Editor load/save and dirty state are in &#96;src/app/components/Editor.tsx&#96;.\\\\\\\\n- Document list/open/delete is in &#96;src/app/components/DocumentList.tsx&#96;.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Architecture (Story 1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart LR\\\\\\\\n  user[Writer] --&gt; fe[ReactFrontend]\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"OIDC login + JWT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| auth[Keycloak]\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Documents API\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| api[FastifyAPI]\\\\\\\\n  api --&gt; docSvc[DocumentService]\\\\\\\\n  docSvc --&gt; pg[(PostgreSQL)]\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Information Flow\\\\\\\\n1. User logs in through OIDC.\\\\\\\\n2. Frontend sends JWT with all document requests.\\\\\\\\n3. API authorizes by token subject and performs document CRUD.\\\\\\\\n4. Frontend replaces IndexedDB calls with API calls.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Functional Requirements\\\\\\\\n- User can create new document with default title.\\\\\\\\n- User can edit title/content and save manually.\\\\\\\\n- Autosave runs only when document is dirty.\\\\\\\\n- User can reopen prior documents from list.\\\\\\\\n- User can delete own documents.\\\\\\\\n- Save behavior must preserve latest title/content together.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Backend API Contract\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /documents&#96; -&gt; list current user's docs by &#96;updated_at desc&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /documents/:id&#96; -&gt; get one owned doc\\\\\\\\n- &#96;POST /documents&#96; -&gt; create owned doc\\\\\\\\n- &#96;PUT /documents/:id&#96; -&gt; update title/content/language\\\\\\\\n- &#96;DELETE /documents/:id&#96; -&gt; delete owned doc\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /me&#96; -&gt; token sanity/profile bootstrap for frontend\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Schema (Backend)\\\\\\\\nTable &#96;documents&#96;:\\\\\\\\n- &#96;id&#96; uuid pk\\\\\\\\n- &#96;owner_id&#96; text not null (OIDC &#96;sub&#96;)\\\\\\\\n- &#96;title&#96; text not null\\\\\\\\n- &#96;content&#96; text not null\\\\\\\\n- &#96;language&#96; text not null check in (&#96;en&#96;,&#96;de&#96;,&#96;ru&#96;)\\\\\\\\n- &#96;created_at&#96; timestamptz not null\\\\\\\\n- &#96;updated_at&#96; timestamptz not null\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nIndexes:\\\\\\\\n- &#96;(owner_id, updated_at desc)&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;(id, owner_id)&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Frontend Integration Plan\\\\\\\\n- Replace &#96;src/app/utils/db.ts&#96; storage methods with API client wrappers (same function surface preferred to reduce churn).\\\\\\\\n- Update &#96;Editor.tsx&#96; load/save lifecycle to call API wrappers.\\\\\\\\n- Update &#96;DocumentList.tsx&#96; list/delete/import-save to call API wrappers.\\\\\\\\n- Keep existing UI behaviors (&#96;hasUnsavedChanges&#96;, save status, toasts).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Non-Goals (Story 1)\\\\\\\\n- Collaboration/realtime editing\\\\\\\\n- Version history\\\\\\\\n- Offline sync conflict resolution\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Acceptance Criteria\\\\\\\\n- Logged-in user can create/edit/save/reopen/delete documents across browser refresh.\\\\\\\\n- Data is no longer required from IndexedDB for normal operation.\\\\\\\\n- User cannot access another user's document IDs.\\\\\\\\n- Autosave does not trigger when there are no unsaved changes.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Risks and Mitigations\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: Save race between autosave and manual save.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: Client-side in-flight guard and last-write-wins by &#96;updated_at&#96;.\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: HTML content from &#96;contentEditable&#96; can include unsafe markup.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: sanitize/allowlist on API write path.\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: Migration from local data to backend loses drafts.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: optional one-time import flow from local IndexedDB.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Test Plan\\\\\\\\n- API integration tests: CRUD with ownership enforcement.\\\\\\\\n- Frontend smoke flow: create -&gt; type -&gt; autosave -&gt; refresh -&gt; reopen.\\\\\\\\n- Negative tests: forbidden access to another user's doc.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":94,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":3796,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Users\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\tommy\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\CS485\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\GlossaDocs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\specs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\user-story-1-basic-editor-spec.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":94}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"729c5419-c47a-4808-a864-e2505c457412\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"f063e6f8-910c-41ab-b6a5-d3613b91d03c\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-09T01:56:49.568Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"call_B3sYyKfOlPhNlQLWKMM8n5hd\\\\nfc_0b99ec397d88285e0169ae202b3ccc8196937cd91bc26b7ede\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"call_B3sYyKfOlPhNlQLWKMM8n5hd\\\\nfc_0b99ec397d88285e0169ae202b3ccc8196937cd91bc26b7ede\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/specs/user-story-3-russian-onscreen-keyboard-spec.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/specs/user-story-3-russian-onscreen-keyboard-spec.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/specs/user-story-3-russian-onscreen-keyboard-spec.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# User Story 3 Spec: Integrated Russian On-Screen Keyboard\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Header\\\\\\\\n- **Story**: As a multilingual writer, I want an integrated on-screen keyboard for a non-Latin alphabet so that I can type special characters directly inside the editor.\\\\\\\\n- **V1 scope**: Russian keyboard only (Cyrillic), phonetic mapping.\\\\\\\\n- **Status**: Draft for implementation\\\\\\\\n- **Depends on**:\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;docs/backend-architecture.md&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;docs/specs/user-story-1-basic-editor-spec.md&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Single-backend assumption**: Uses the same auth/session/document backend as Story 1. No separate service.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Goal\\\\\\\\nAdd an in-editor Russian keyboard panel that inserts characters at cursor, supports uppercase/punctuation, and persists visibility preference globally.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Current Code Baseline\\\\\\\\n- Keyboard UI and insertion pipeline already exist in &#96;src/app/components/Editor.tsx&#96; and &#96;LanguageKeyboard&#96; integration.\\\\\\\\n- Keyboard remapping utilities exist (&#96;getRemappedCharacter&#96; import in &#96;Editor.tsx&#96;), but persistence and backend-aware preference model are not finalized.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Architecture (Story 3)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart LR\\\\\\\\n  user[Writer] --&gt; fe[ReactFrontendEditor]\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt; kbd[KeyboardPanelController]\\\\\\\\n  kbd --&gt; ins[InsertAtCursorPipeline]\\\\\\\\n  ins --&gt; fe\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"JWT + document save\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| api[FastifyAPI]\\\\\\\\n  api --&gt; pg[(PostgreSQL)]\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Information Flow\\\\\\\\n1. User toggles keyboard panel (default visible).\\\\\\\\n2. User clicks key or long-press variant.\\\\\\\\n3. Character is inserted via same editor insertion path used for typed text.\\\\\\\\n4. Document save/autosave persists content through Story 1 backend.\\\\\\\\n5. Keyboard visibility preference is persisted as a global user setting (backend-backed when settings endpoint is available; local fallback during transition).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Functional Requirements\\\\\\\\n- Keyboard panel is visible by default.\\\\\\\\n- User can show/hide via button (and optional hotkey later).\\\\\\\\n- Russian layout supports:\\\\\\\\n  - lowercase + uppercase (shift/caps behavior)\\\\\\\\n  - punctuation keys needed for practical writing\\\\\\\\n  - long-press variants for mapped characters\\\\\\\\n- Key click inserts at caret and replaces selection when selection exists.\\\\\\\\n- Insertions participate in normal undo/redo behavior.\\\\\\\\n- Feature is scoped to Russian in V1; extensible to additional layouts later.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Shared Backend Contract Impact\\\\\\\\nThis story relies on Story 1 document save APIs and adds one cross-story setting:\\\\\\\\n- &#96;keyboard_visible&#96; (boolean) in user/app settings model.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nRecommended settings API (same backend, optional in same phase):\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /settings&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;PUT /settings&#96; (partial update)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nIf settings API is deferred, frontend may temporarily store &#96;keyboard_visible&#96; locally but must migrate to backend setting key later.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Model Additions\\\\\\\\n- In settings storage domain (same backend service):\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;keyboard_visible boolean default true&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nNo new document table columns required for Story 3 itself.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## UI/Behavior Contract\\\\\\\\n- Keyboard is rendered inside editor screen, not separate modal/window.\\\\\\\\n- Insert pipeline should call a single text insertion utility to avoid divergent behavior between physical keyboard remap and panel input.\\\\\\\\n- Long-press interaction:\\\\\\\\n  - short click -&gt; primary mapped character\\\\\\\\n  - hold -&gt; variant picker -&gt; selected variant insert\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Extensibility Rules\\\\\\\\n- Layout registry keyed by layout ID (for example &#96;ru-phonetic-v1&#96;), not hard-coded to one locale string.\\\\\\\\n- Locale choice and layout choice should be decoupled in future (same language may have multiple layouts).\\\\\\\\n- Avoid embedding key maps directly in component render logic; keep them in data/config modules.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Acceptance Criteria\\\\\\\\n- Russian keyboard appears by default in editor.\\\\\\\\n- User can toggle visibility and preference persists across sessions.\\\\\\\\n- Clicking keys inserts correct Cyrillic characters at cursor.\\\\\\\\n- Shift/caps and punctuation behave as defined.\\\\\\\\n- Long-press variant selection works and inserts chosen character.\\\\\\\\n- Saving and reopening document retains inserted content via backend persistence.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Risks and Mitigations\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: Insertion path divergence causes formatting/cursor bugs.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: one insertion utility shared by keyboard click and key remap.\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: Hard-coded layout blocks future language growth.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: layout registry + config-driven key definitions.\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: UX friction on desktop for long-press discoverability.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: tooltip/hint on first use and fallback direct key mapping.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Test Plan\\\\\\\\n- Unit tests for Russian mapping tables and long-press variant resolution.\\\\\\\\n- Component tests for toggle + insertion + shift/caps states.\\\\\\\\n- End-to-end: login -&gt; open doc -&gt; insert Cyrillic -&gt; save -&gt; refresh -&gt; verify persistence.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":99}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:/Users/tommy/CS485/GlossaDocs/docs/specs/user-story-3-russian-onscreen-keyboard-spec.md\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# User Story 3 Spec: Integrated Russian On-Screen Keyboard\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Header\\\\\\\\n- **Story**: As a multilingual writer, I want an integrated on-screen keyboard for a non-Latin alphabet so that I can type special characters directly inside the editor.\\\\\\\\n- **V1 scope**: Russian keyboard only (Cyrillic), phonetic mapping.\\\\\\\\n- **Status**: Draft for implementation\\\\\\\\n- **Depends on**:\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;docs/backend-architecture.md&#96;\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;docs/specs/user-story-1-basic-editor-spec.md&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Single-backend assumption**: Uses the same auth/session/document backend as Story 1. No separate service.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Goal\\\\\\\\nAdd an in-editor Russian keyboard panel that inserts characters at cursor, supports uppercase/punctuation, and persists visibility preference globally.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Current Code Baseline\\\\\\\\n- Keyboard UI and insertion pipeline already exist in &#96;src/app/components/Editor.tsx&#96; and &#96;LanguageKeyboard&#96; integration.\\\\\\\\n- Keyboard remapping utilities exist (&#96;getRemappedCharacter&#96; import in &#96;Editor.tsx&#96;), but persistence and backend-aware preference model are not finalized.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Architecture (Story 3)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart LR\\\\\\\\n  user[Writer] --&gt; fe[ReactFrontendEditor]\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt; kbd[KeyboardPanelController]\\\\\\\\n  kbd --&gt; ins[InsertAtCursorPipeline]\\\\\\\\n  ins --&gt; fe\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  fe --&gt;|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"JWT + document save\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| api[FastifyAPI]\\\\\\\\n  api --&gt; pg[(PostgreSQL)]\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Information Flow\\\\\\\\n1. User toggles keyboard panel (default visible).\\\\\\\\n2. User clicks key or long-press variant.\\\\\\\\n3. Character is inserted via same editor insertion path used for typed text.\\\\\\\\n4. Document save/autosave persists content through Story 1 backend.\\\\\\\\n5. Keyboard visibility preference is persisted as a global user setting (backend-backed when settings endpoint is available; local fallback during transition).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Functional Requirements\\\\\\\\n- Keyboard panel is visible by default.\\\\\\\\n- User can show/hide via button (and optional hotkey later).\\\\\\\\n- Russian layout supports:\\\\\\\\n  - lowercase + uppercase (shift/caps behavior)\\\\\\\\n  - punctuation keys needed for practical writing\\\\\\\\n  - long-press variants for mapped characters\\\\\\\\n- Key click inserts at caret and replaces selection when selection exists.\\\\\\\\n- Insertions participate in normal undo/redo behavior.\\\\\\\\n- Feature is scoped to Russian in V1; extensible to additional layouts later.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Shared Backend Contract Impact\\\\\\\\nThis story relies on Story 1 document save APIs and adds one cross-story setting:\\\\\\\\n- &#96;keyboard_visible&#96; (boolean) in user/app settings model.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nRecommended settings API (same backend, optional in same phase):\\\\\\\\n- &#96;GET /settings&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;PUT /settings&#96; (partial update)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nIf settings API is deferred, frontend may temporarily store &#96;keyboard_visible&#96; locally but must migrate to backend setting key later.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Data Model Additions\\\\\\\\n- In settings storage domain (same backend service):\\\\\\\\n  - &#96;keyboard_visible boolean default true&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nNo new document table columns required for Story 3 itself.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## UI/Behavior Contract\\\\\\\\n- Keyboard is rendered inside editor screen, not separate modal/window.\\\\\\\\n- Insert pipeline should call a single text insertion utility to avoid divergent behavior between physical keyboard remap and panel input.\\\\\\\\n- Long-press interaction:\\\\\\\\n  - short click -&gt; primary mapped character\\\\\\\\n  - hold -&gt; variant picker -&gt; selected variant insert\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Extensibility Rules\\\\\\\\n- Layout registry keyed by layout ID (for example &#96;ru-phonetic-v1&#96;), not hard-coded to one locale string.\\\\\\\\n- Locale choice and layout choice should be decoupled in future (same language may have multiple layouts).\\\\\\\\n- Avoid embedding key maps directly in component render logic; keep them in data/config modules.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Acceptance Criteria\\\\\\\\n- Russian keyboard appears by default in editor.\\\\\\\\n- User can toggle visibility and preference persists across sessions.\\\\\\\\n- Clicking keys inserts correct Cyrillic characters at cursor.\\\\\\\\n- Shift/caps and punctuation behave as defined.\\\\\\\\n- Long-press variant selection works and inserts chosen character.\\\\\\\\n- Saving and reopening document retains inserted content via backend persistence.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Risks and Mitigations\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: Insertion path divergence causes formatting/cursor bugs.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: one insertion utility shared by keyboard click and key remap.\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: Hard-coded layout blocks future language growth.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: layout registry + config-driven key definitions.\\\\\\\\n- **Risk**: UX friction on desktop for long-press discoverability.\\\\\\\\n  - **Mitigation**: tooltip/hint on first use and fallback direct key mapping.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Test Plan\\\\\\\\n- Unit tests for Russian mapping tables and long-press variant resolution.\\\\\\\\n- Component tests for toggle + insertion + shift/caps states.\\\\\\\\n- End-to-end: login -&gt; open doc -&gt; insert Cyrillic -&gt; save -&gt; refresh -&gt; verify persistence.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":99,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":4722,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"C:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Users\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\tommy\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\CS485\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\GlossaDocs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\specs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\user-story-3-russian-onscreen-keyboard-spec.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":99}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"24bde693-ad6b-4b69-a14c-c1a70f63e5e0\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"f0a2ddf5-0ade-471c-aadc-f81612b241f3\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"
